# Extração: 06-6.0 - Humor

- **Fonte:** 06-6.0 - Humor.pdf
- **Tipo:** PDF
- **Páginas:** 0
- **Tamanho:** 0.02 MB

---

Identifying moments of humor in the story, including the low-hanging fruit, as well as
moments where humor can enhance other aspects of the story, can make a big
difference for a storyteller. Humor can conceal the boring parts of a story as well as
enhance surprise and suspense. In this lesson, you’ll learn to identify these locations in
the story and simple strategies for being funny.

-- 1 of 1 --
